changes.change: Migrated the asset build off laravel-mix/webpack entirely onto esbuild-based node scripts (scripts/build/): extracted handlebars/lang/concat/copies/versioning into standalone scripts, ported app.js bundling and Sass compilation to esbuild/dart-sass, then removed laravel-mix, webpack, and their loader chain — with MR CI gaining a production-build job to catch bundler breakage going forward.
